target.name: JAK1-biased cytokine signaling
target.desired_profile: Reduce inflammatory cytokine signaling with low systemic exposure.

assay_plan.name: cellular cytokine inhibition
assay_plan.decision_threshold: IC50 below 100 nM with selectivity over JAK2

assay_plan.name: permeability screen
assay_plan.decision_threshold: Caco-2 apparent permeability below program cutoff

research_questions: Which candidates best match a gut-restricted JAK1-biased profile?
Which claims need literature or assay evidence before proceeding?
What is the next experiment for each high-priority candidate?
